summary: Phase 3 Direction FLOWTYM - Report Workflow testing completed. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Fixed critical bug: AddInvoiceDto now accepts invoice_amount without requiring invoice_url.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports - List all reports
Backend: GET /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports/stats - Get statistics
Backend: POST /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports - Create new report
Backend: GET /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports/:reportId - Get single report
Backend: POST /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports/:reportId/take-over - Take over report
Backend: POST /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports/:reportId/comment - Add comment
Backend: POST /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports/:reportId/invoice - Add invoice (with amount only)
Backend: POST /api/v2/hotels/:hotelId/reports/:reportId/resolve - Resolve report
Backend: Edge case - Cannot take over already in-progress report (404)
Backend: Edge case - Cannot resolve already resolved report (404)
Backend: Edge case - Non-existent report returns 404
Frontend: ReportsTab - Stats cards (En attente, En cours, Résolu) displayed correctly
Frontend: ReportsTab - Report cards with data-testid='report-card-{id}' present
Frontend: ReportsTab - Search and filter functionality working
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - Progress Stepper with 3 steps (Signalé, En cours, Résolu)
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - Timeline/Historique showing all actions
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - 'Prendre en charge' button for En attente status
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - Comment textarea for En cours status
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - 'Ajouter une facture' button for En cours status
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - 'Marquer comme résolu' button for En cours status
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - Status badges and priority badges displayed
Frontend: ReportDetailPanel - Info grid (reporter, date, technician, facture)
Frontend: Stats update after workflow actions
seed_data_creation: Created UI_TEST_401 report for testing En attente workflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Direction Module - Report Workflow fully tested. ReportDetailPanel shows Progress Stepper, Timeline/Historique, and Actions section. Workflow: En attente (Prendre en charge button) → En cours (comment, facture, résolution) → Résolu. All data-testid attributes present: report-card-{id}. Backend APIs all working with proper status transitions and edge case handling.

progress_stepper.visual_indicators: Checkmark for completed, highlighted for current, gray for pending

backend_apis.comment: POST /reports/:id/comment - Adds comment to comments array

bug_fixed.issue: AddInvoiceDto required invoice_url but frontend only sends invoice_amount
